title: Successful user signup with valid email and password
description: Verify that a new user can sign up with a valid email and password and is redirected to the authenticated area with a valid session token stored.

steps.description: Navigate to the signup page
Input valid email and password
Submit the signup form
Confirm user is registered successfully
Verify redirection to protected user area
Check authentication token is stored and session persists on page refresh

title: Login fails with incorrect credentials
description: Ensure that login fails when a user enters an incorrect email or password and appropriate error messages are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter invalid email and/or password
Submit the login form
Verify login failure message is shown
Confirm user remains on login page

title: Session token persistence and middleware redirect
description: Validate that authenticated sessions persist across page reload and protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login page.

steps.description: Login successfully and obtain auth token
Refresh the browser page
Confirm user session remains active and token is valid
Log out to clear session
Attempt to access a protected page directly via URL
Verify redirection to login page for unauthenticated user

title: Create, save draft, and schedule a digital memory
description: Verify users can create a new memory message, save it as draft, and schedule it for future delivery with proper warnings if data is unsaved upon navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to memory creation page
Enter valid memory content
Save the memory as draft
Confirm draft is saved and retrievable
Schedule the memory for a future date
Confirm scheduled time is set correctly
Attempt to navigate away without saving while edits are unsaved
Verify warning prompt is displayed for unsaved changes

title: Save and retrieve data from Digital Vault
description: Ensure user can securely save sensitive legacy information to the digital vault and retrieve it without data corruption.

steps.description: Navigate to the Digital Vault page
Create a new vault entry with sensitive data
Save the vault entry
Confirm the vault entry is saved successfully
Refresh the page or logout and login again
Retrieve the vault entry and verify data integrity and confidentiality

title: Subscription plan upgrade and immediate plan status update
description: Verify that when a user upgrades from Basic to Pro plan, payment is processed successfully and user's subscription status updates instantly in the system.

steps.description: Navigate to Plans page
Select 'Pro' subscription plan
Enter valid payment details and confirm payment
Confirm payment is processed without errors
Verify user subscription status updates to 'Pro' immediately
Check database record for updated subscription status

title: Create and manage public memorial space
description: Test that users can create a public memorial space, add content, and the space is publicly accessible as intended.

steps.description: Navigate to memorial space creation page
Create a new memorial space with 'public' visibility
Add memories or messages to the memorial
Confirm memorial space is created successfully
Access the memorial space from a logged-out state or different user account
Verify content is viewable publicly without authentication

title: Create and manage private memorial space with access restricted
description: Confirm that private memorial spaces require authentication or specific recipient verification for access, restricting unauthorized viewing.

steps.description: Create a memorial space marked 'private'
Add memories/messages to the private memorial
Verify creation is successful and privacy settings are saved
Attempt to access the private memorial space from an unauthenticated session
Confirm access is denied or redirected to recipient verification
Complete recipient verification process
Confirm access is granted to authorized recipients

title: Recipient verification workflow success
description: Test that the recipient verification process correctly authenticates recipients before granting access to legacy messages.

steps.description: Navigate to recipient verification page via message access link
Input required verification credentials (e.g., email or code)
Submit verification information
Confirm identity is verified successfully
Verify access to intended messages is granted post verification

title: Recipient verification failure with invalid credentials
description: Ensure that recipient verification prevents access when invalid credentials are entered and appropriate error messages are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to recipient verification page
Enter invalid or incomplete verification data
Submit for verification
Verify verification fails with error message
Confirm access to messages is denied

title: Billing error handling during plan payment
description: Verify that payment failures during subscription plan purchase are handled gracefully with clear error messages and user remains on payment page.

steps.description: Select a subscription plan
Enter invalid or declined payment details
Attempt to submit payment
Verify payment fails with an accurate error message
Confirm user remains on payment page without subscription update

title: Landing page responsive layout on mobile and tablet
description: Verify that the landing page UI displays correctly on mobile and tablet screen sizes without overlapping, clipping, or broken layout.

steps.description: Load the landing page on mobile viewport size
Check hero section, features, and pricing overview for proper layout and no clipping
Resize or reload landing page on tablet viewport size
Verify content is readable, well spaced, and no overlapping UI elements

title: Smooth animations with no visual glitches on landing page
description: Confirm that all splash screen and scroll-triggered animations run smoothly without flicker, freezing, or glitches.

steps.description: Load the landing page and observe splash screen animation
Verify splash screen animation plays smoothly without pauses or flicker
Scroll down to trigger scroll animations
Confirm animations are smooth with no visual artifacts or glitches

title: No console errors or hydration warnings during runtime
description: Verify that the application runs without console errors, hydration warnings, or warnings regarding invalid DOM nesting during usage.

steps.description: Open developer console in browser
Navigate through all main pages (landing, auth, create memory, vault, plans, memorial, recipient verification)
Confirm no JavaScript errors or warnings appear in console
Verify no hydration or invalid DOM nesting warnings are present

title: API call authorization returns 401/403 are handled and surfaced properly
description: Validate that all API calls handle unauthorized or forbidden responses properly without silent failures and show appropriate user feedback.

steps.description: Perform API calls requiring authorization with expired or invalid token
Verify API returns 401 or 403 errors
Confirm UI surfaces proper error messages or redirects user to login
Perform API calls with insufficient permissions
Validate errors are handled and users are notified accordingly

title: Landing page meta titles and descriptions are unique and update per page
description: Check that each primary page has unique meta title and description tags and Open Graph images update correctly without caching issues.

steps.description: Visit landing page
Verify meta title and description are unique and correct
Navigate to other main pages (auth, plans, memorials)
Confirm each page updates meta tags uniquely
Check Open Graph images load fresh without caching using hard refresh
Verify correct Open Graph images display for each page
